title: Will ₹10 crore be enough to retire comfortably? Expert says ‘wrong approach’ | Use this simple formula to understand
summary: Determining retirement needs requires calculating future monthly expenses, factoring in inflation, and estimating the necessary corpus. For example, a current expense of ₹70,000 may grow to ₹3 lakh in 30 years, necessitating a corpus of about ₹5.2 crore for adequate retirement funding.

title: SBI Funds Management gets Sebi nod for IPO
